post.description: OAuth2 compatible token login, get an access token for future requests.

get.description:
Get current user profile with RBAC permissions.

Returns user data including their role-based permissions for use
in frontend authorization checks.

Retrieve users.
Only Admins can list all users.

post.description:
Create a new user.
Admin only.

get.description:
Get current user's preferences.
Requires read permission.

put.description:
Update current user's preferences.
Requires update permission.

get.description:
Get a specific user by id.
Admin can get any user. Users can only get themselves.
Requires read permission.

put.description:
Update a user.
Admin can update any user. Users can only update themselves.
Requires update permission.

delete.description:
Soft delete a user.
Admin only.

get.description:
Get version history for a user.
Admin can view any user's history. Users can only view their own.
Requires read permission.
Retrieve departments with server-side features. Requires read permission.

post.description: Create a new department. Admin only.

get.description: Get a specific department by id. Requires read permission.

delete.description: Soft delete a department. Admin only.

get.description: Get version history for a department. Requires read permission.

Retrieve projects with server-side search, filtering, and sorting.

Supports:
- **Search**: Case-insensitive search across code and name
- **Filters**: Filter by status, code, name (format: "column:value;column:value1,value2")
- **Sorting**: Sort by any field (asc/desc)
- **Pagination**: Returns total count for proper pagination UI
- **Mode**: Branch mode - "merged" (combine with main) or "isolated" (current branch only)

Requires read permission.

parameters.name: mode

schema.description: Branch mode: merged (combine with main) or isolated (current branch only)
schema.title: Mode

parameters.description: Branch mode: merged (combine with main) or isolated (current branch only)

parameters.name: as_of

schema.description: Time travel: get Projects as of this timestamp (ISO 8601)
schema.title: As Of

parameters.description: Time travel: get Projects as of this timestamp (ISO 8601)

post.description: Create a new project. Requires create permission.

get.description:
Get a specific project by id. Requires read permission.

Supports time-travel queries via the as_of parameter to view
the project's state at any historical point in time.

parameters.name: as_of

schema.description: Time travel: get project state as of this timestamp (ISO 8601)
schema.title: As Of

parameters.description: Time travel: get project state as of this timestamp (ISO 8601)

put.description: Update a project. Requires update permission.

delete.description: Soft delete a project. Requires delete permission.

get.description: Get version history for a project. Requires read permission.

Get all branches for a project.

Returns the main branch plus any change order branches (co-{code})
that exist for this project.

Requires read permission.

Retrieve WBEs with server-side search, filtering, and sorting.

Supports two modes:
1. **Hierarchical filtering** (project_id/parent_wbe_id): Returns list without pagination
2. **General listing** (no hierarchical filters): Returns paginated response with search/filter/sort

Hierarchical Filtering:
- project_id only: All WBEs in project
- project_id + parent_wbe_id: Child WBEs of specified parent
- parent_wbe_id='null': Root WBEs (parent_wbe_id IS NULL)

General Listing (when no hierarchical filters):
- **Search**: Case-insensitive search across code and name
- **Filters**: Filter by level, code, name (format: "column:value;column:value1,value2")
- **Sorting**: Sort by any field (asc/desc)
- **Pagination**: Returns total count for proper pagination UI
- **Mode**: Branch mode - "merged" (combine with main) or "isolated" (current branch only)

Requires read permission.

parameters.name: parent_wbe_id

schema.description: Filter by parent WBE ID (use 'null' string for root WBEs)
schema.title: Parent Wbe Id

parameters.description: Filter by parent WBE ID (use 'null' string for root WBEs)

schema.description: Branch mode: merged (combine with main) or isolated (current branch only)

schema.title: As Of

Retrieve change orders for a project with pagination.

Change Orders are always scoped to a specific project.
The auto-created branch for each CO is named `co-{code}`.

Requires read permission.

parameters.name: as_of

schema.description: Time travel: get Change Orders as of this timestamp (ISO 8601)
schema.title: As Of

parameters.description: Time travel: get Change Orders as of this timestamp (ISO 8601)

post.description:
Create a new change order with automatic branch creation.

This endpoint:
1. Creates the Change Order on the main branch
2. Automatically creates a `co-{code}` branch for isolated work
3. Returns the created Change Order

The auto-created branch allows changes to be developed in isolation
before merging to main when approved.

Requires create permission.

get.description:
Get a specific change order by change_order_id (UUID root identifier).

Supports time-travel queries via the as_of parameter to view
the change order's state at any historical point in time.

Requires read permission.

parameters.name: as_of

schema.description: Time travel: get change order state as of this timestamp (ISO 8601)
schema.title: As Of

parameters.description: Time travel: get change order state as of this timestamp (ISO 8601)

put.description:
Update a change order's metadata.

Creates a new version with the updated metadata. Optionally specify a branch
to update on a specific branch (will auto-fork from main if no version exists
on the target branch).

Requires update permission.

delete.description:
Soft delete a change order.

Marks the current version as deleted.

Requires delete permission.

get.description:
Get a change order by business code (e.g., "CO-2026-001").

Returns the current active version on the specified branch.

Requires read permission.

Get version history for a change order.

Returns all versions across all branches, showing the complete
audit trail of changes.

Requires read permission.

post.description:
Merge a Change Order's branch into the target branch.

Infers the source branch from the Change Order code (e.g., `co-{code}`).

Requires update permission.

Revert a Change Order to its previous version.

Requires update permission.

get.description:
Get impact analysis for a change order by comparing branches.

Analyzes the financial and schedule impact of a change order by comparing
data between the main branch and the specified change branch.

Returns:
    - KPI Scorecard: BAC, Budget Delta, Gross Margin comparison
    - Entity Changes: Added/Modified/Removed WBEs and Cost Elements
    - Waterfall Chart: Cost bridge visualization
    - Time Series: Weekly S-curve budget comparison

Requires read permission.
